title: Utami's Plaid Bed
description: The Utami Plaid Bed is a lightweight visual upgrade package that transforms beds with softer textures, natural shades and muted colours. It retains the original style while offering a cleaner, more contemporary aesthetic.
body:
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-plaid%20bed-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=curseforge&labelColor=f16436&cacheSecon) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/plaid-bed)     [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-repo-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=github&color=blue&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://github.com/futonid)     [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-plaid%20bed-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=modrinth&labelColor=1bd769&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/utamis-plaid-bed)     [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-support-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=buymeacoffee&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=quality&color=b5ffe5&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://buymeacoffee.com/utamiid)

Utami's Plaid Bed is a lightweight visual upgrade package that revamps beds with softer textures, natural shades, and muted colors. It maintains the original style while providing a cleaner, more modern look. This resource pack is fully standalone. You can use either the original version or the plaid version, but not both at the same time. > Utami's Plaid Bed is an alternative visual version of [Utami's Bed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/utamis-bed) model, featuring a plaid texture style with softer details, natural shades, and muted colors. > I hope you like it ___
